name: advancedpro-root
description: Root package.json to proxy Render commands to backend

scripts.build: node -e "console.log('Static frontend build: no build step required')"
scripts.render:build: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix backend run render:build
scripts.postinstall: node -e "if (process.env.VERCEL) { console.log('Skipping backend install on Vercel static deploy'); } else { require('child_process').execSync('npm --prefix backend install', { stdio: 'inherit' }); }"
